description: Color daytime photograph (no graphic design or added slogans). Two law-enforcement officers shake hands and smile in front of a silver SUV outside a brick building. The officer at left, seen from behind, wears a black raid jacket with large yellow 'POLICE ICE' lettering and 'SUPERVISOR' below; the officer facing him is smiling and wears olive tactical clothing with a 'POLICE' chest plate and a federal badge patch, plus a tactical vest and gloves. Another officer at right wears a cap and vest reading 'POLICE ICE'; bystander faces are blurred. The 'POLICE ICE' and 'SUPERVISOR' wording is jacket and vest marking within the photograph.
notable_text: POLICE ICE; SUPERVISOR; POLICE (apparel markings, not designed text)
